pi_items.metadata_value: Not explicitly stated in metadata, but task assumes 5-star rating exists
pi_items.source: Web search: NHTSA.gov 2023 Toyota Camry safety ratings. Multiple sources confirm 5-Star Overall Safety Rating in all crash test categories (frontal, side, rollover).

pi_items.metadata_value: Not explicitly stated in metadata, but task requires finding recall count
pi_items.source: Web search: CarComplaints.com 2023 Toyota Camry recalls. Verified recalls: (1) Head Restraint Brackets (24TB04, 24TA04, 23TA05) and (2) Wheel Lug Nuts (23TA05). Confirmed by multiple sources including Toyota recall databases.

pi_items.metadata_value: Not explicitly stated in metadata, but task assumes rating exists
pi_items.source: Web search: NHTSA.gov 2023 Ford F-150 safety ratings. Multiple sources confirm 5-Star Overall Safety Rating for 2023 Ford F-150 SuperCrew configuration.

pi_items.metadata_value: Not explicitly stated in metadata, but task requires finding recall count
pi_items.source: Web search: CarComplaints.com and NHTSA.gov 2023 Ford F-150 recalls. Identified recalls include: (1) Rear Axle Hub Bolt (23V896), (2) Rear Axle Wiring Harness (23S35), (3) Moonroof Wind Deflector, (4) Rearview Camera Freeze, (5) Integrated Trailer Module Communication, (6) Front Control Arm Separation, (7) Parking Brake. Confirmed from multiple sources.

pi_items.metadata_value: Not explicitly stated in metadata, but task assumes rating exists
pi_items.verified_value: 4 Stars overall (Frontal: 4 stars driver/5 stars passenger, Side: 5 stars, Rollover: 3 stars)
pi_items.source: Web search: NHTSA.gov 2023 Jeep Wrangler safety ratings. Multiple sources confirm 4-Star Overall Safety Rating from NHTSA, with lower rollover rating (3 stars) due to vehicle's high center of gravity.

pi_items.metadata_value: Not explicitly stated in metadata, but task requires finding recall count
pi_items.source: Web search: CarComplaints.com and NHTSA.gov 2023 Jeep Wrangler recalls. Verified 12 recalls include steering column control module welding, high voltage battery fire (PHEV), rearview camera failures, instrument panel cluster failures, defrosting system issues, and other safety issues.

pi_items.metadata_value: Task description assumes 'Electronic Stability Control' technical report (PDF/HTML) exists on NHTSA.gov for 2023 Toyota Camry
pi_items.verified_value: NHTSA maintains ESC research documents and technical specifications (FMVSS No. 126), but no specific 'Electronic Stability Control' technical report dedicated to 2023 Toyota Camry model was found. NHTSA has research PDFs on general ESC effectiveness and standards (using older model Camry in research), but no recent Camry-specific ESC report.
pi_items.source: Web search for NHTSA Toyota Camry Electronic Stability Control technical report. Found NHTSA Light Vehicle Handling and ESC Effectiveness Research Program (using 2003 Camry), but no 2023-specific ESC report. Found general ESC standards document FMVSS No. 126 but not Camry-specific.

pi_items.metadata_value: Task requires navigating to nhtsa.gov to find vehicle safety and recall data
pi_items.verified_value: nhtsa.gov is accessible and contains the required vehicle safety ratings and recall information for 2023 Toyota Camry, Ford F-150, and Jeep Wrangler
pi_items.source: Web search successfully retrieved NHTSA URLs for all three vehicles: https://www.nhtsa.gov/vehicle/2023/TOYOTA/CAMRY, https://www.nhtsa.gov/vehicle/2023/FORD/F-150, https://www.nhtsa.gov/vehicle/2023/Jeep/Wrangler. Database is publicly accessible and searchable.

pi_items.metadata_value: Task requires finding data for: 2023 Toyota Camry (4-Door Sedan), 2023 Ford F-150 (Super Crew), 2023 Jeep Wrangler (4-Door Unlimited)
pi_items.verified_value: All three vehicle configurations have dedicated pages on NHTSA.gov with safety ratings and recall information available
pi_items.source: Web search confirmed existence of NHTSA.gov vehicle pages for all three models. Specific configurations exist: Toyota Camry 4-Door configurations, Ford F-150 SuperCrew, and Jeep Wrangler 4-Door Unlimited/SUV configurations.

privileged_info_summary: The 2023 Toyota Camry has a 5-Star Overall Safety Rating and 2 NHTSA recalls (head restraint brackets and wheel lug nuts). The 2023 Ford F-150 SuperCrew has a 5-Star Overall Safety Rating and 7 NHTSA recalls (including rear axle issues, wiring harness, moonroof deflector, camera freeze, trailer module communication, control arm separation, and parking brake issues). The 2023 Jeep Wrangler 4-Door has a 4-Star Overall Safety Rating and 12 NHTSA recalls covering steering column control modules, battery fire risks, camera failures, instrument cluster issues, and defrosting system problems. NHTSA.gov is publicly accessible with dedicated vehicle pages for all three models. However, no specific 'Electronic Stability Control technical report' for the 2023 Toyota Camry was found on NHTSA.gov, though general ESC technical standards and research documents exist.
